programme.title: Braven

programme.title: 99 Homes [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: 10th & Wolf [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: While serving in the military, a Marine sergeant (James Marsden) believes his family's ties to organized crime are a thing of the past. However, an act of insubordination and a visit from the F.B.I. send him packing to his South Philadelphia hometown, and he discovers that his brother (Brad Renfro) and his cousin (Giovanni Ribisi) have become entangled with mobsters, leaving him with only one way to save them.

programme.title: Blind Horizon [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Found in the New Mexico desert with a head wound and total amnesia, Frank Kavanaugh (Val Kilmer) is brought to a hospital. When he recovers some of his memory, he begins raving about an upcoming assassination attempt on the president. Despite the man's unstable state, Sheriff Jack Kolb (Sam Shepard) is troubled by Frank's story. Discovering the truth grows more complicated when Chloe Richards (Neve Campbell) arrives and claims to be Frank's fiancée, even though he has no memory of her.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Five men share a loft for affairs; a woman’s body changes everything.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: A retiring police detective pledges to catch the killer of a young child.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Confronted with the injustices around them, four reluctant heroes form an unlikely alliance in order to rescue the town of Silverado from a nasty sheriff.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: The rousing story of a poor squire's (Heath Ledger) quest to change his fate, win the heart of an exceedingly fair maiden (Sossamon) and rock his medieval world.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Kiki (Julia Roberts), is the personal assistant to beautiful megastar, Gwen (Catherine Zeta-Jones) and is in love with Eddie (John Cusack), Gwen s estranged husband. Kiki is given the monumental task of helping Gwen and Eddie make it through a press junket organized by publicity exec Lee Phillips (Billy Crystal). But at this junket, everything is going to change.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Good Neighbor Sam
programme.desc: A wacky comedy about a happily married advertising agent who helps out his single neighbor by posing as her husband so she can inherit $15 million.

programme.title: Oliver!
programme.desc: Charles Dickens classic tale of a waif in 19th Century England comes alive brilliantly in this Oscar-winning musical. Fleeing a life of workhouse servitude, Oliver (Mark Lester) arrives in London to seek his fortune. During his adventures, Oliver meets a gallery of unforgettable Dickens low-lifes.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: Alligator
programme.desc: A baby alligator is flushed down a Chicago toilet and survives by eating discarded laboratory rats injected with growth hormones. The small reptile grows gigantic, escapes the city sewers, and goes on a rampage.

programme.title: I'm Charlie Walker
programme.desc: The true story of how one desperate man, armed with only his charm and wits, takes on a racist San Francisco corporation in 1971.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: From Stephenie Meyer, the creator of the worldwide phenomenon The Twilight Saga, comes this daring and romantic thriller based on the bestselling novel. When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world. The Host is a passionate and powerful epic love story.

programme.title: Compromising Positions
programme.desc: An ex-newspaper woman who is now a suburban housewife can't resist getting involved in an investigation of the murder of a philandering dentist who had been having affairs with several of her neighbors.

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: An experienced hitman and his unhinged partner target a blue-collar couple who have entered Witness Protection

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own..

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: Jackie Cogan, an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: An ex-boxer turned enforcer has his loyalties tested when his employers order him to kill for the first time.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Baby Assassins
programme.desc: Two high school girls who are about to graduate also happen to be highly-skilled assassins. When the organization that employs them orders them to share a room, their relationship turns sour.

programme.title: Baby Assassins 2
programme.desc: Chisato and Mahiro must pay four years of overdue fees or lose their membership in their assassin guild. They take part-time jobs, but find themselves in the middle of an armed robbery and being hunted by other assassins.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: A former gang leader battles human traffickers to save her kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Honed from childhood to be an elite assassin, Sook-hee embarks on a rampage of violence and revenge to finally earn her freedom and escape her past.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.title: Mommy's Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Mallory's life flips when son Billy is drawn to mysterious Samantha at the pool.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Mitchell's former manager and prison security supervisor are speaking out.

programme.title: Living with My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Mara forgives the man who killed her mom and allows him to work on her property.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A matchmaker risks falling for a real-life prince before his royal wedding date.

programme.title: Come Dance at My Wedding
programme.desc: A woman faces opposition from her estranged father when she plans to sell the family's dance studio.

programme.title: A Missed Connection
programme.desc: After sparks fly with a woman on a train platform, a photographer posts a missed connection in the newspaper.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister’s manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The Kitty Hallow Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose in Houston killing pedophiles and rapists. When Mason and Jessica get into a horrible car accident on their wedding day, Jessica wakes up with no memory of her life or even her husband. As her memories start to come back in pieces, she is afraid that her husband, Mason, could be The Kitty Hallow Killer.

programme.title: Tethered Hearts
programme.desc: Token is a charismatic club owner who’s inherited his father’s iconic jazz club, and uses it at a sanctuary for the broken and struggling artists. When a shady music executive starts to recruit his talent, he fights to keep his club afloat.

programme.title: Murder on the Blade
programme.desc: Tobin, a young man with a troubled childhood is currently working through his trauma with a professional counselor. Meanwhile, there is a serial killer on the loose targeting sex workers, and several clues are pointing to both him and his troubled relationship with his mother.

programme.title: Bloodline Secrets
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Keisha is engaged to be married to the man of her dreams, Joseph. Joseph believes he’s ready for marriage with the love of his life but his best friend, John, has his doubts about Keisha’s faithfulness. When family secrets come out of the shadows, it puts their marriage and lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Flight World War II
programme.desc: After passing through a storm, passengers and crew on a 757 time-travel to WWII and must help turn the tide.

programme.title: Sinbad And The War Of The Furies
programme.desc: Modern-day Sinbad accidentally releases the Furies, three ancient beings who threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: Battle Star Wars
programme.desc: An evil Coalition leader threatens to destroy a Rebel planet. His daughter joins the Rebels against him.

programme.title: Black Panthers of WWII
programme.desc: As WWIl reaches its turning point, the 761st Tank Battalion, a majority-African American unit known as the Black Panthers, must fight to stop Germany's advance during the Battle of the Bulge. The fate of the free world is in their hands.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc is chased by three attractive ladies through a DIY house of horrors.

programme.title: The Dark Side Of The Moon
programme.desc: In 2022, a repair crew is sent to fix an orbital weapon but their spaceship malfunctions and ends up heading toward the dark side of the moon. There, in a mysterious, seemingly abandoned space shuttle, a sinister force lies in wait.

programme.title: Galaxy Of Terror (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The minds innermost fears become reality for the crew members of the Quest when they land on the barren planet Morganthus hoping to find the missing crew members of the starship Remus only to discover something deadly waiting for them. Each member of the rescuing team must come face to face with their darkest fears or perish. The cast onboard the Quest includes Edward Albert (The House Where Evil Dwells), Erin Moran (Happy Days), Ray Walston (My Favorite Martian), Robert Englund (A Nightmare On Elm Street series), Zalman King (Blue Sunshine) and Sid Haig (House Of 1,000 Corpses).The film also had its share of new and emerging talent behind the camera, including James Cameron (The Terminator, Aliens, Avatar), who did the production design, and Bill Paxton, who worked as a set decorator before he later collaborating with Cameron in front of the camera as an actor.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of IT
programme.desc: This in-depth look at the 1990 mini-series based on Stephen King's iconic novel features interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Seth Green, Richard Thomas, and Tim Curry, who portrayed the notorious monster clown, Pennywise.

programme.title: Stake Land (Edited Version)
programme.desc: America is a lost nation. When an epidemic of vampirism strikes and his family is slaughtered, young Martin (Gossip Girls Connor Paolo) is taken under the wing of a grizzled, wayward hunter (In the Cuts Nick Damici) whose new prey are the undead. Simply known as Mister, the vampire stalker takes Martin on a journey through the locked-down towns of Americas heartland, searching for a better place to call home while taking down any bloodsuckers that cross their path.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After a long winter trapped in the ice, scouting parties are sent out in search of open water. One of the teams makes a frightening discovery.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With something now stalking the ships, the captains debate their options, testing their loyalty to one another against their duty to their crews.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A cunning attack on the ships proves the men are not battling an ordinary bear and that the region's Inuit culture may hold a key to their survival.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A strange illness begins to show itself while another more familiar one jeopardizes the expedition's most valuable resource - its captain's judgment.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the men begin their long march south for rescue, a series of shocking events underscores how vulnerable and exposed their situation has become.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: A lawman becomes a deputy in a town where he suspects his dead friend was framed for murder.

programme.desc: A band of Confederates robs a Union gold shipment only to discover the end of the war has made them outlaws.

programme.title: The Bandit Of Zhobe
programme.desc: THE BANDIT OF ZHOBE is a western set in India, with the jut-jawed hero (Mature), the sweet young thing (Aubrey), and comic relief (Newley). Mature is an Indian leader whose family as been wiped out by the British. Truth is, it wasn't the British at all but a rival group of Indians wearing British red coats.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: Zane Grey's novel "Twin Sombreros" is the inspiration behind this hard riding dust-up of a Western. Randolph Scott is the fast gun whose purpose is to cut a corrupt cattle baron down to size when the baron selfishly monopolizes the market.

programme.title: Northwest Trail
programme.desc: Mountie Matt OBrien assignment is simple: He is to escort the rather grouchy, and slightly annoying, Miss Katherine Owens to a remote outpost. Things complicate however when they arrive at the outpost and he stumbles upon an illegal mining operation. Stars include Bob Steele, Joan Woodbury, and Poodles Hanneford.

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Ted Hayden, a tough hombre who goes undercover to join a gang led by a heartless fiend known only as Mr. Gentry (Lloyd Whitlock). Gentry is out to take over a ranch belonging to one of Hayden's friends, but as Hayden finds out, Gentry has a lot more than that up his sleeve. You'll have to watch this two-fisted Western to find out the rest!

programme.title: Randy Rides Alone
programme.desc: John Wayne was 27 when he starred in this vintage western drama from Hollywoods Poverty Row. He plays Randy Bowers, a man wrongly jailed for murders. With help from a female friend, he breaks out of prison and sets out to find the real killers. Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons, Rustlers Paradise) directs a strong cast of familiar faces, including legendary sidekick George Gabby Hayes, Earl Dwyer, and one of the hardest ridin stuntmen turned actors, Yakima Canutt.

programme.title: Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Icon of early talking pictures, Harry Carey (Red River), portrays the rugged Trigger Carson, a noble cowboy who infiltrates an outlaw gang in order to expose their rackets. Ordered to kidnap a young girl, his identity is revealed and he is forced to fight his way out of the gang and back to safety. Already 56 by the time he signed on to do this and a series of Westerns for Berke Productions, the stately Carrey (who netted an Oscar nomination four years later) was widely lauded at the time for adding a great deal of maturity and respectability due to his undeniable presence and strong performances.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as Fuzzy Q. Jones.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals California Carson and Jimmy Rogers, he sets out to expose the real culprits and clear Tims name. The usual cast is here, including William Boyd as Hoppy, plus Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers, and in one of his earliest roles, Robert Mitchum.

programme.desc: In Part 2, Day 2, Mark Peterson continues his quest to complete the Upland Slam of 27 bird species in a series only available on YouTube, The Journey Within – A Bird Hunter’s Diary. Mark is in Alaska hunting the three species of ptarmigan; willow ptarmigan, white-tailed ptarmigan and rock ptarmigan. This is a two part episode where Mark is hunting with his father Earl as they cover miles of rocky terrain in search of these elusive birds in the high elevations of Alaska.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Whole Fried Smashed Rockfish: Deuki Hong and Matt Rodbard, authors of Koreaworld: A Cookbook, make a dish they first experienced on the eastern coast of Jeju Island—a whole fried rockfish ladled with a sticky, fiery sauce and then smashed into bite-size pieces. A truly brilliant way to do whole fish!

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo: Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chris Makes Beef & Broccoli" - Who doesn't love broccoli beef (other than vegetarians)??? Lucky for you, Chris Ying woke up with a craving for THAT EXACT DISH. Here he shows you how to make his dead simple version (using the microwave to speed things up). This is some high-quality weeknight cooking, people! Make it for yourself and let us know what you think.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Brandon Jew's "MSG" Fried Chicken" - Chef Brandon Jew, owner of Michelin-starred Mr. Jiu's in San Francisco's Chinatown, shares his recipe and techniques for making his "MSG" (mushroom/seaweed/garlic) Fried Chicken, inspired by the original fried chicken recipe from his grandfather's restaurant, The Four Seas.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Fresh Bok Choy Kimchi with Monica Lee" - The wonderful Monica Lee of Beverly Soon Tofu is back in the kitchen with her daughters to share her recipe for fresh Bok Choy Kimchi. This is an easy way to have a big batch of homemade kimchi in the fridge, or split it in half to use some to make a quick banchan. This recipe and many more are available in Monica's new book, Sohn-mat: Recipes and Flavors of Korean Home Cooking.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Feast of the 7 Fishes: David Chang and Chris Ying attempt to make it all in 45 minutes!" - David Chang is at it again, dragging his buddy Chris Ying along in a no-horse open sleigh for the daunting challenge of preparing an entire Feast of 7 Fishes spread in 45 minutes! Once the timer starts, it's completely unedited and presented in real-time. No cuts, no tricks..nothing but Peter, Kate, Buzz, Megan, Linnie and Jeff

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Eggs Jambalaya" - Rachel, Chris, and Bryan tackle a fan-submitted recipe for “eggs jambalaya,” which, spoiler alert, bears little resemblance to authentic jambalaya, but we’re not complaining.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "David Chang Makes Korean Fusion Carne Asada" - Inspired by Bricia Lopez's recipe for Carne Asada, David Chang reimagines the flavors and dishes through a Korean lens. Dave puts together an absolute feast and explains his thinking that led to each dish.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Buttery Sage Stuffing" - Just in time for the holidays, the Recipe Club (Dave Chang, Chris Ying, and guest John deBary) dissects the most butter-filled stuffing recipe of all time, then tries to recreate it three ways: in under 20 minutes (John; ultra luxe (Dave); and keto (Chris).

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Pork Chili" - Dave and Chris are joined by special guest Dave Arnold to run up the score on his very own Game-Day Pork Chili recipe! This is one of those recipes that you can make a huge batch of and be everyone’s favorite tailgate buddy. But, as usual, the Recipe Club isn’t going to take the easy way out. Dave does a Caribbean-inspired spin based on the true story of Jamaican oxtail, Chris tried an Italian-style fusion, and the guys—kind as ever—insisted that Dave Arnold turn this pork chili dish into a cocktail.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Salmon

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: This meal is the holiday favorite that is so good, Julia & Jacques recommend it for any day of the year. Roast Turkey with sausage and cornbread stuffing, gravy made the old-fashioned way, accompanied by creamed onions and a zesty Cranberry-Apple Chutney. The “not-quite” which has to be seen, is the inventive way the turkey is cut-up before cooking, roasted and re-assembled for serving.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom head to Dom’s hometown of Manchester, the world’s first industrialised city and now a vibrant food capital. They brunch at cult diner Gooey, learn to cook curry at a classic “Rice & Three” café, explore the science behind ice cream cones, and enjoy a special tour of Manchester United’s iconic stadium.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom journey across Costa Rica from the northern Pacific coast to San José. In Nicoya, a renowned Blue Zone, they uncover dietary secrets linked to long, healthy lives. Venturing into the jungle, they work on a coffee plantation and discover why Costa Rica is the world’s leading exporter of pineapples.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Ciudad Juárez, Pati joins in with a group of Pachuco dancers, who are passionately preserving this distinctive Prohibition-era culture's traditions. Together they head to the iconic Kentucky Bar, rumored to be the birthplace of the margarita. Later, she savors an icon of Juárez's food scene, the burrito, at Burritos El Compa where the Olivares are keeping their family legacy alive.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: For the indigenous Rarámuri people, long-distance running through Chihuahua's majestic Copper Canyon is a way of life. Pati meets the Moreno brothers, who are famous for winning ultramarathons. In Huetosachi, community leader María Monarca teaches Pati about the art of cooking with corn in Rarámuri cuisine, from nixtamalization to a traditional dish known as "chacales."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Chihuahua's capital, Chihuahua City, Pati meets the first member of the Rarámuri people to become a world-famous pianist, Romeyno Gutiérrez, who teaches her the basics of Rarámuri music before taking her to his favorite barbacoa spot. Pati's also invited into the home of Chef Ana Rosa Beltrán del Río to cook a few ancient Chihuahuan recipes and learn the art of drying chiles.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati journeys to Casas Grandes to experience the preserved foods, or "conservas," that sustained people during the Mexican Revolution. She meets a family that has lived for generations at Hacienda de San Diego, Mexico's "White House" for a day after the battle of Casas Grandes, including Diana Acosta and her mother, Sara Ramírez, who still preserves food the way they did during the war.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati saddles up for an exhilarating ride into the heart of Chihuahua's ranch and rodeo life. She gets a lesson in roping and riding from rodeo champion Ricardo "Bubba" Nevárez and his friends, then is invited to a post practice carne asada. She also meets Chihuahua's most influential cattle rancher, Álvaro Bustillos, at his Rancho El Arroyo, where the ranch cook serves up some cowboy delicacies.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Casas Grandes, Pati rides in style with local art curator Mayte Luján in her 1960s Cadillac. Mayte owns a bed and breakfast, Las Guacamayas, where she invites Pati into the kitchen to make chile con queso in impossibly soft flour tortillas. Later, Pati learns about another tasty export from Chihuahua, pecans, at Gustavo Vázquez's farm, where his family has been growing them for generations.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Mata Ortiz, a village known for its exquisite pottery, and learns its history from local potter Tavo Silveira, who is known worldwide and even made a piece for the pope. Then Pati gets her hands dirty with talented duo Laura Bugarini and Héctor Gallegos, who teach her the basics of Mata Ortiz pottery. Turns out, Tavo can also cook and makes an asado de puerco feast in the town square.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic Collection 2
programme.desc: Join Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic, as he repairs a whole new bunch of vehicles for even more animal friends!

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Helen needs a torch pod for the opening torch relay ceremony of the International Children’s Games. She needs the Super Wings to perform the torch relay! When her elephant sanctuary floods in Chiang Mai, Thailand, Kulap orders elephant-sized life jackets and water wings so she can guide the elephants to safety. A baby white elephant is separated from the group and carried away by water currents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Abu is exploring the excavations at Petra in Jordan with his uncle. But there's a big problem: he forgot to bring along one of his prized toy robots. Jett flies to Erfoud, Morocco, and delivers a fossil detector to a boy named Kamal who wants to find a rare fossil to complete his collection. Jett and Kamal find themselves in an underground lake with a live, ancient whale called a Basilosaurus!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers recycling boxes to George, a young boy who worries that the dirty beaches of Mantanani Island will stop his friend Duggy the Dugong from visiting. Jett, George, and his Grandpa discover an island of rubbish floating in the sea. Jett delivers a telescope to Amélie who is at the Louvre Museum with her mom. Things go awry when the Mona Lisa is stolen...and Amélie's mom disappears, too!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Riley is in Singapore visiting his friend Lifen who is a local movie star. Golden Boy is a huge fan of Lifen's and wants to be in the movie with her.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maggie wants to be a buddy-cop-duo with her pet Chihuahua, Kiki, and help people in need. So, Jett delivers police costumes and joins them in patrolling the town. Jett flies to Hamburg to deliver a pair of mini vacuum cleaners to help Lars and his Dad clean up a spillage of popcorn across their impressive model village. They have trouble reaching popcorn inside the village's train tunnel.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Peiru and her dad are hiking the Great Wall of China in Beijing. Heavy snowfall has made the Great Wall difficult to traverse, so Peiru orders winter hiking gear. Dale wants to be in an underwater bike race with his dad, and help him win. So Jett delivers a tandem bicycle and agrees to join their team. Things take a turn when Golden Boy enters the race and sends them off-course.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a princess's dogs need to attend training school she worries that they're too playful to pass. Jett and Donnie deliver some special training suits to help them succeed. When the Super Pets accidentally knock down a birthday piñata at a house outside of Mexico City, Jett and Jerome deliver a huge piñata replacement for the boy's party.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets visit Pisa, Italy where some street cats have made a mess spilling recycling bins. Jett and a new Super Wing called Shine deliver tongs and help with the clean up. The Super Pets are in Pohang, South Korea where they meet a girl whose robot is in need of repairs. Jett and Jerome deliver a much needed repair kit and some robot dance lessons!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy in the Serengeti National Park whose ball rolls into an ostrich nest. The mother ostrich thinks the ball is one of her eggs and won't give it back. When a hippo gets stuck on a waterslide at a community swimming pool in Kenya, a boy calls on the Super Wings to deliver a hippo-sized life ring to help free it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers winter clothes to a little girl living in Egypt's Sahara Desert where a cold snap has left the desert snowy. Jett and Astra show her how to enjoy the snow. After the Super Pets accidentally knock down some Turkish rugs in an Istanbul market, Jett and Ellie deliver a magic lamp that can summon two genies.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy, Kima, and his Dad are trekking through the Himalaya mountains in Nepal. The Super Wings bring an LED torch to help them. Trouble strikes when a baby yeti startles them. Vo, the Mars rover, is celebrating his birthday but misses his friend Catalina. Jett and Astra come to the rescue and promise to bring Catalina and her ginormous gift to Mars.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Top 100 Nursery Rhymes - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the handpicked Top 100 nursery rhymes and children songs by Kids TV. Babies will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning preschool songs like , humpty dumpty, wheels on the bus, finger family, three little kitten, old mac donald, sick song, doctor doctor song, boo boo song, zoo song,i dont want to and much more with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Baby Big Cheese - Kindergarten Popular Nursery Rhymes & Kids Song
programme.desc: Baby Big Cheese is filled with timeless nursery rhymes and beloved baby songs! Enjoy classic melodies that bring joy and laughter. Perfect for Toddlers & Children Education. The Videos are a musical adventure for Babies to sing, dance, and cherish.

programme.title: Baby Lemon - Nursery Rhymes And Kids Songs
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Lemon, a fun world of nursery rhymes and kids' songs featuring many children's favorite and popular nursery rhyme characters, like Humpty Dumpty, Old MacDonald, and many more. Our animated nursery rhyme videos make learning fun, impart family values & encourage healthy habits while entertaining babies. Preschoolers can learn letters, numbers, animal sounds, colors, shapes & more!

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! Come join Little Treehouse as they sing, dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic wheels on the bus called the wheels on the bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like rain rain go away, row row your boat, head shoulder knees and toes and many more

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Wheels On The Garbage Truck + More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Little Treehouse is back with more nursery rhymes for toddlers that you will enjoy. Wheels on the Garbage Truck is here to take you on a fun ride where we sing-along, dance and have fun.Come join in this preschool adventure and enjoy it with your friends. Little Treehouse has some amazing animated learning videos and more baby rhymes collection like,Who Stole My Toy, Happy Elephant, Chew Your Food, Doctor Checkup Song, Swimming Song, Peek A Boo, Rock a Bye Baby and many more Kindergarten Songs.

programme.title: Farmees Movie Compilation
programme.desc: Farmees brings you the best of nursery rhymes and kids songs. Your kids are sure to enjoy!

programme.title: Dinobees Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Welcome to #Dinobees, a funny show for kids. It revolves around a family that discovers and adopts three dinosaurs. This comedy cartoon is perfect entertainment for toddlers.Dinobees has some amazing 3d animations. Get ready to have great jungle adventures with cartoon animals and dinosaurs.This entertaining playlist is a collection of videos for children like Fire Discovery, Fruits of Labour, Magical Berries, Catch me If You can, Glue Trap, Mis Splits, I Wanna Fly, The Gophers, Baby Sitter, Frozen Lake, Bubble Trouble, Where's My Water and many more videos.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: After an accident, Scratch thinks he's an eagle and on the side of Sonic. In order to impress his his new lady love, Scratch assists Sonic in an excursion into Robotnik's Fortress to turn off a dangerous force field.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year. So Strawberry Shortcake and her two friends, Orange Blossom and Ginger Snap, go in search of spring. Spring is a young girl who doesn't want to do her job until Strawberry convinces her that everyone needs Spring's help and shows her that working together can make any job fun!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch. Things get complicated when there's a competition to decide which Ranch Hand runs the Best Bunkhouse.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside. Things aren't going so well for Caramel Corn: her farm animals seem to be running away.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there's an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a retelling of "Sleeping Beauty" - but our focus is on the fairy that didn't get her invitation.

programme.desc: Ruth Buzzi reads Miss Nelson Is Back.

programme.desc: Pete Seeger performs his version of Abiyoyo, adapted from an old African folk tale.

programme.desc: Amy Linker reads a story about a family that has to replace furniture lost in a fire.
